src: ANDROID. ChipsLayoutManager (SpanLayoutManager, FlowLayoutManager). A custom layout manager for RecyclerView which mimicric TextView span behaviour, flow layouts behaviour with support of amazing recyclerView features
ja: Android 向け ChipsLayoutManager（SpanLayoutManager、FlowLayoutManager）。TextView のスパン動作やフローレイアウトを模倣し、RecyclerView の豊富な機能をサポートするカスタムレイアウトマネージャー
